description_long: This is a stylized child figure with a large head, expressive eyes, and short, tousled hair. The child is dressed in a short-sleeve shirt with horizontal stripes and a pair of knee-length shorts. The arms are extended straight out to the sides, and the feet are bare, with toes clearly defined. The proportions are cartoon-like, with a slightly oversized head and hands relative to the body. The surface appears smooth and matte, with simple, clean color blocking and no visible accessories or additional items. The overall appearance is playful and suitable for urban or park environments.
description: A cartoon-style child with short, tousled hair, wearing a striped short-sleeve shirt and knee-length shorts, standing with arms outstretched and bare feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the child's face, striped shirt, shorts, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, nose, and the side of the shirt and shorts.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and shorts, with both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, hair, and the side of the body.
attribute_hairstyle: short, tousled hair with layered texture
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
